human_verification.notes: Reviewed validated readiness for planning-boundary separation, chemicals-specific permit and field-risk handling, functionality coverage, research-pack completeness, and runtime-specification-based posture.

specialist_owned_evidence: Manifest enforces recommendation-only planning boundaries for demand, schedule, and allocation decisions with explicit routing to EHS, maintenance, field operations, engineer-of-record, and regulatory-reporting lanes.
Authoritative sources cover planning workflow, threshold and permit boundaries, inspection and incident evidence handling, and recognized asset-management practice rather than only one dimension.
Functionality map covers all required shared, planning-scheduling-and-allocation, and industrial-and-regulated-operations abilities with scenario coverage for every scenario in evaluation results.
Research summary maps workflow stages, artifacts, systems of record, decision boundaries, domain failure modes, and required scenario families to this chemicals and materials planning lane.

review_notes: No functional or evidence blockers remain for this package draft.

All required scenario families and escalation families are represented, including permit evidence gaps, field-risk changes, authority-side signoff requests, final approval refusal, and tenant adaptation.

notes: validated conditions met for recommendation-only materials planning specialist in regulated materials manufacturing.
Runtime remains specification-based and must be promoted to a retained implementation only through separate governance and committed implementation history.
